# 1.1.2
Death waypoint implementation and more customizable offset of locator bar.
## Added
- Added death waypoint that shows when a player has a Recovery Compass in inventory. Togglable in settings.
- Added X and Y offset sliders for more customizable position config (resolves [#5](https://github.com/FuzjaJadrowa/LocatorBar/issues/5) issue).
- Added support for 26.2 versions.
## Changed
- Removed button "Locator Bar Offset" for Reworked style config.

[See GitHub Release for full changelog.](https://github.com/FuzjaJadrowa/LocatorBar/releases/tag/v1.1.2)
